ideation: This sequence will show the robot mimicking a cow's gentle, swaying movements.  It will involve a slow, rhythmic movement of both arms, suggesting the calm and peaceful nature of a cow.  The arms won't move too much, keeping the animation subtle and in line with the cow's demeanor.  We'll use a slight outward rotation at joint1 to suggest a relaxed posture, and a gentle swinging motion using joint2.  The wrists will remain mostly neutral, with slight adjustments for a more natural look.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, a gentle sway begins
arms lift slightly outwards, a calm bovine posture
arms swing back down, a slow rhythmic pulse
arms settle slightly outwards again, peaceful and still
